changeSet.author: nsagon
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM public.document WHERE tenant_id IS NOT NULL AND document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL') AND id != ( SELECT max(d2.id) FROM public.document d2 WHERE d2.tenant_id = document.tenant_id AND d2.document_category = document.document_category );

changeSet.author: nsagon
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM public.document WHERE guarantor_id IS NOT NULL AND document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL') AND id != ( SELECT max(d2.id) FROM public.document d2 WHERE d2.guarantor_id = document.guarantor_id AND d2.document_category = document.document_category );

changeSet.author: nsagon
changeSet.sql: -- Create unique index concurrently for tenants CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS uq_tenant_single_document_category ON public.document (tenant_id, document_category) WHERE tenant_id IS NOT NULL AND document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL');

changeSet.author: nsagon
changeSet.sql: -- Create unique index concurrently for guarantors CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS uq_guarantor_single_document_category ON public.document (guarantor_id, document_category) WHERE guarantor_id IS NOT NULL AND document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL');
